title: felicia heterophylla
intro: Felicia heterophylla, also known as Blue Felicia or Bush Daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Felicia heterophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
